title: The Unitary Manifold: A 5D Gauge Geometry of Emergent Irreversibility (Version 9.28)
description: We present the Unitary Manifold (UM), a five-dimensional Kaluza-Klein framework in which thermodynamic irreversibility, information flow, and quantum transition asymmetry are unified as projections of a single higher-dimensional geometry. The fifth dimension is compact, the cylinder condition is imposed, and the 5D metric is cast in the standard Kaluza-Klein block form with a vector field B_mu — the irreversibility 1-form — and a scalar phi — the entropic dilaton. Dimensional reduction of the 5D Einstein-Hilbert action yields a 4D effective action whose field equations we call the Walker-Pearson equations. We show that (i) the Second Law of Thermodynamics is a geometric identity rather than a statistical postulate; (ii) information pressure provides a purely geometric alternative to a cosmological constant; (iii) entropic holography identifies boundary entropy with bulk area; and (iv) a Thermodynamic Cosmic Censorship Conjecture asserts that irreversible singularities are hidden behind holographic boundaries. Version 9.28 extends the framework to 99 pillars + sub-pillars (CLOSED), adding Pillar 70-C (n_w=5 DERIVED from GW+APS+SU(2)_L geometry without SM input), Pillar 99-B (k_primary derived from cubic CS 3-form integral), Pillar 15-F (cold fusion falsification protocol), and consciousness reclassification with grid-cell falsification test. The k_CS=74 Completeness Theorem proves that seven independent structural constraints all uniquely select 74, making the closure self-referential and formally complete. Numerical implementation covering 14,972 passing tests (tests/ + recycling/ + 5-GOVERNANCE/Unitary Pentad/ + omega/) is provided for independent verification. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19584531
notes: This work is dedicated to the Defensive Public Commons. All ideas, methods, and scientific principles contained herein are freely available for public use without restriction. Version 9.28 — Gap Closure. 14,972 automated tests pass (tests/ + recycling/ + 5-GOVERNANCE/Unitary Pentad/ + omega/); 330 skipped (76 dual-use + 254 Pentad product). Full test suite available at https://github.com/wuzbak/Unitary-Manifold-
